name: BasicCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Basic Commands' command group — 2 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 28.0).

methods.name: GetProductInfo
methods.summary: Accesses the version information from the running Archicad.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: version, buildNumber, languageCode.

methods.name: IsAlive
methods.summary: Checks if the Archicad connection is alive.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: isAlive.
